title: Multi-Agent-Simulation of Kaizen using artisoc
content:
# Multi-Agent-Simulation of Kaizen using artisoc

Authors: Iwao, Shumpei
Published: 2020-03-12T17:07:02Z
Subjects: Business and Management, Social Sciences
DOI: doi:10.7910/DVN/UN14B7

This file is a multi-agent simulation model of continuous improvement activities using artisoc (programming language for multi-agent-system developed in Japan). You can observe how improvement activities generate innovation.

Citation: Iwao, Shumpei, 2020, "Multi-Agent-Simulation of Kaizen using artisoc", https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/UN14B7, Harvard Dataverse, V1
